limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or named vendor/infrastructure partnerships disclosed in excerpts; only generic references to AI use in learning platforms.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI use in internal learning/talent platform is named and described as launched/in-production but no quantified business results (e.g., time saved, adoption rates) are provided.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material (mdna) is present and includes named AI-specific risk categories (GenAI/LLM cybersecurity, competitive disintermediation, regulatory compliance) with described mechanisms of revenue/deposit impact, supporting score of 4; no quantified risk exposure or named governance body found in excerpts.
Data center loan balance ($736M in 2025) reflects CRE lending exposure, not CFG's own AI/compute capex, and is excluded from capex_mentions.
